name: revit_add_pdf_export_naming_rule
description: Adds a parameter-based entry to the PDF export file naming rule for a named ExportPDFSettings preset.

settings_name.description: Name of the ExportPDFSettings element to modify

category_id.description: Category id for the naming rule parameter (e.g. OST_Sheets)

parameter_id.description: BuiltInParameter or shared parameter element id

notes: Export must not use combined PDF output (options.Combine=false) or naming rule changes are ignored.
